member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter
member.summary: Provides color conversion utilities between different color formats (RGB, HSV, HEX).

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter.RgbToHsv(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color)
member.summary: Converts a Color to HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) format.
member.returns: A HSV struct containing H (0-360), S (0-100), V (0-100), and A (0-255) values.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter.HsvToRgb(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Converts HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) values to a Color.
member.returns: A Color object representing the HSV values.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter.HexToColor(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a hexadecimal color string to a Color object.
member.returns: A Color object representing the hex value, or Colors.Black if invalid.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter.ColorToHex(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Converts a Color object to a hexadecimal color string.
member.param: Whether to include the alpha channel in the result.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter.ColorToRgba(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color)
member.summary: Converts a Color object to RGBA byte values.
member.returns: A RGBA struct containing R, G, B, and A byte values (0-255).

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter.RgbaToColor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: Converts RGBA byte values to a Color object.
member.returns: A Color object representing the RGBA values.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorConverter.IsValidHex(System.String)
member.summary: Validates if a string is a valid hexadecimal color representation.
member.returns: True if the string is a valid hex color, otherwise false.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorExtensions.Lighten(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a lighter version of the specified color.
member.param: The lightening factor (0-1). Higher values make the color lighter.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorExtensions.Darken(Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a darker version of the specified color.
member.param: The darkening factor (0-1). Higher values make the color darker.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.PaletteCellShape
member.summary: Specifies the mode of the color picker.
Defines the available types for displaying the color palette.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.PaletteCellShape.Default
member.summary: A rectangular palette showing opacity variations of base colors.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.PaletteCellShape.Circle
member.summary: The color palette is displayed with circular grid cells.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.PaletteCellShape.Square
member.summary: The color palette is displayed with rectangular grid cells.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorPickerMode
member.summary: Specifies the mode of the color picker.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorPickerMode.Spectrum
member.summary: Displays a color spectrum for selecting colors.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ColorPickerMode.Palette
member.summary: Displays a color palette for selecting predefined colors.

member.summary: Provides data for the event.

member.summary: Gets the old color value.

member.summary: Provides data for the event.

member.summary: Gets the current color value before the change is applied.

member.summary: Gets the tentative new color value that the user is currently selecting.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SelectedColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently selected color.
member.value: A value representing the selected color. The default is .

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SelectedColor="Blue" />
var colorPicker = new SfColorPicker(); colorPicker.SelectedColor = Colors.Blue;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the color picker popup is open.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is false.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker IsOpen="True" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ShowAlphaSlider
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the alpha slider.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is true.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker ShowAlphaSlider="False" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ShowInputArea
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the input fields.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is true.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker ShowInputArea="False" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.IsColorModeSwitcherVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the color palette.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is true.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker IsColorModeSwitcherVisible="False" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ShowRecentColors
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show recent colors.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is true.

example.code: <!-- Hide recent colors section --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker ShowRecentColors="False" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ShowNoColor
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show the "No Color" option.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is false.

example.code: <!-- Show "No Color" option to allow transparent selection --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker ShowNoColor="True" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ColorMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the color picker mode (Spectrum or Palette).
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Set to spectrum mode for continuous color selection --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker ColorMode="Spectrum" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteCellShape
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of color palette display (Circle or Rectangle).
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Set circular palette cells --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PaletteCellShape="Circle" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteCellSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of rectangular color cells when ColorPaletteType is Rectangle.
member.value: A double value representing the cell size in device-independent units. The default is 30.0.

example.code: <!-- Set larger palette cells --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PaletteCellSize="40" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteCellCornerRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the corner radius of the square color cells when ColorPaletteType is Default.
member.value: A double value representing the cell size in device-independent units. The default is 0.

example.code: <!-- Set larger palette cells --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PaletteCellCornerRadius="15, 12, 15, 7" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteRowSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the spacing between rows in the color palette grid.
member.value: A double value representing the spacing in device-independent units. The default is 0.0.

example.code: <!-- Add spacing between palette rows --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PaletteRowSpacing="5" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteColumnSpacing
member.summary: Gets or sets the spacing between columns in the color palette grid.
member.value: A double value representing the spacing in device-independent units. The default is 0.0.

example.code: <!-- Add spacing between palette columns --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PaletteColumnSpacing="5" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteColors
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of colors to display in the color palette.
member.value: A containing the colors to display. The default includes basic colors like Black, Red, Blue, Yellow, etc.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.PaletteColors> <x:Array Type="{x:Type Color}"> <x:Static Member="Colors.Red" /> <x:Static Member="Colors.Green" /> <x:Static Member="Colors.Blue" /> <x:Static Member="Colors.Yellow" /> </x:Array> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.PaletteColors> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteRowCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of rows in the color palette grid.
member.value: An integer value greater than 0. The default is 10.

example.code: <!-- Set a 5x5 palette grid --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PaletteRowCount="5" PaletteColumnCount="5" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PaletteColumnCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of columns in the color palette grid.
member.value: An integer value greater than 0. The default is 10.

example.code: <!-- Set a 8-column palette --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PaletteColumnCount="8" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ColorChangedCommand
member.summary: Gets or sets the command to execute when the Apply button is clicked.
member.value: An instance. The default is null.

example.code: <!-- Bind to view model command --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker ColorChangedCommand="{Binding ColorChangedCommand}" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.IsActionButtonsVisible
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the action buttons (Apply/Cancel) are visible.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is true.

example.code: <!-- Hide action buttons for immediate color application --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker IsActionButtonsVisible="False" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.IsInline
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether the color picker is displayed inline (embedded in the UI) instead of showing in a popup or flyout.
member.value: A Boolean value. The default is false.

example.code: <!-- Display inline within the page layout --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker IsInline="True" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PopupBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the background brush for the color picker popup.
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Set solid color background --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PopupBackground="LightGray" /> .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ApplyButtonBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the background brush for the Apply button.
member.value: A value. The default is null.

example.code: <!-- Set Apply button background --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker ApplyButtonBackground="Green" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.ApplyButtonLabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the text style for the Apply button.
member.value: A instance. The default is null.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.ApplyButtonLabelStyle> <syncfusion:LabelStyle FontSize="16" TextColor="White" FontAttributes="Bold" /> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.ApplyButtonLabelStyle> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.CancelButtonBackground
member.summary: Gets or sets the background brush for the Cancel button.
member.value: A value. The default is null.

example.code: <!-- Set Cancel button background --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker CancelButtonBackground="Red" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.CancelButtonLabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the text style for the Cancel button.
member.value: A instance. The default is null.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.CancelButtonLabelStyle> <syncfusion:LabelStyle FontSize="16" TextColor="White" FontAttributes="Bold" /> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.CancelButtonLabelStyle> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SpectrumInputViewLabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the text style for the spectrum input view.
member.value: A instance. The default is a new LabelStyle instance.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.SpectrumInputViewLabelStyle> <syncfusion:LabelStyle FontSize="14" TextColor="Black" FontFamily="Arial" /> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.SpectrumInputViewLabelStyle> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SliderThumbFill
member.summary: Gets or sets the fill brush for the slider thumb.
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Set solid color fill for slider thumb --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SliderThumbFill="Blue" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SliderThumbStroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke brush for the slider thumb.
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Set slider thumb stroke color --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SliderThumbStroke="Black" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SliderThumbStrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke thickness for the slider thumb.
member.value: A double value representing the thickness in device-independent units. The default is 2.0.

example.code: <!-- Set thicker stroke for slider thumb --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SliderThumbStrokeThickness="3" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SliderThumbRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the radius for the slider thumb.
member.value: A double value representing the radius in device-independent units. The default is 8.0.

example.code: <!-- Set larger slider thumb --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SliderThumbRadius="12" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SelectionIndicatorRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the radius of the spectrum selection indicator.
member.value: A double value representing the radius in device-independent units. The default is 10.0.

example.code: <!-- Set larger selection indicator --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SelectionIndicatorRadius="15" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SelectionIndicatorStroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke color of the selection indicator.
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Set white stroke for better visibility on dark backgrounds --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SelectionIndicatorStroke="White" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SelectionIndicatorStrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke thickness of the selection indicator.
member.value: A double value representing the thickness in device-independent units. The default is 2.0.

example.code: <!-- Set thicker stroke for selection indicator --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SelectionIndicatorStrokeThickness="3" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.RecentColorsLabelStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the text style for the recent colors label.
member.value: A instance. The default is a new LabelStyle instance.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.RecentColorsLabelStyle> <syncfusion:LabelStyle FontSize="14" TextColor="DarkGray" FontAttributes="Italic" /> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.RecentColorsLabelStyle> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SelectedColorIcon
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon displayed for the selected color in the color picker display view.
member.value: A instance. The default is null.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.SelectedColorIcon> <FontImageSource FontFamily="MaterialIcons" Glyph="" Color="Black" Size="20" /> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.SelectedColorIcon> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SelectedColorIconSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the size of the selected color icon.
member.value: A double value representing the icon size in device-independent units. The default is 24.0.

example.code: <!-- Set larger icon size --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker SelectedColorIconSize="32" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.SelectedColorTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the data template used to customize the appearance of the selected color display view.
member.value: A instance. The default is null.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.SelectedColorTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border StrokeThickness="2" Stroke="Gray" BackgroundColor="{Binding .}"> <Label Text="Color" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center" /> </Border> </DataTemplate> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.SelectedColorTemplate> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.DropDownButtonTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the content template for the dropdown button of the color picker.
member.value: A that defines the visual structure of the dropdown button.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker.DropDownButtonTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border StrokeThickness="2" Stroke="Gray" BackgroundColor="{Binding .}"> <Label Text="Color" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center" /> </Border> </DataTemplate> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker.DropDownButtonTemplate> </syncfusion:SfColorPicker>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.DisplayViewHeight
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that defines the height of the display view in the color picker.
member.value: A double value representing the height in device-independent units. The default is 32.0.

example.code: <!-- Set taller display view --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker DisplayViewHeight="48" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.DisplayViewStroke
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke color for the display view border.
member.value: A that represents the stroke color of the display view border. The default value is .

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker DisplayViewStroke="Red" />
var colorPicker = new SfColorPicker(); colorPicker.DisplayViewStroke = Colors.Red;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.DisplayViewStrokeThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the stroke thickness for the display view border.
member.value: A double value representing the stroke thickness in device-independent units. The default value is 1.0.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker DisplayViewStrokeThickness="3" />
var colorPicker = new SfColorPicker(); colorPicker.DisplayViewStrokeThickness = 3;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.DropDownWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the width of the dropdown button in the color picker display view.
member.value: A double value representing the width in device-independent units. The default is 32.0.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfColorPicker DropDownWidth="48" />

var colorPicker = new SfColorPicker();
colorPicker.DropDownWidth = 48;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.PopupRelativePosition
member.summary: Gets or sets a value to open the popup relative to a view.
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Open popup above the color picker --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker PopupRelativePosition="AlignTopLeft" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.FlowDirection
member.summary: Gets or sets the flow direction for the color picker layout, determining whether the content is laid out from left to right or right to left.
member.value: A value. The default is .

example.code: <!-- Set flow direction to right-to-left for RTL languages --> <syncfusion:SfColorPicker FlowDirection="RightToLeft" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.EnableLiquidGlassEffect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the liquid glass effect is enabled for the view.
member.value: It accepts bool values, and the default value is False.
member.remarks: This effect is supported only on macOS and iOS platforms.

example.code: <inputs:SfColorPicker EnableLiquidGlassEffect="{OnPlatform iOS=true, MacCatalyst=true, Default=false}" />

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfColorPicker.IsRTL
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the layout direction is right-to-left.

member.summary: Gets or sets an object source used to generate the content of the control.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.DropDownControls.DropDownListBase.ItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the data template for dropdown item in dropdown view.
member.value: The default value is null.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.DropDownControls.DropDownListBase.DisplayMemberPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the name or path of the property that is displayed for each data item in the drop down.
member.value: The default value is string.Empty.
member.return: The name or path of the property that is displayed for each the data item in the drop down.
member.remarks: In non-editable mode, search will be performed using DisplayMemberPath when the popup is opened. If TextMemberPath is null or string.Empty, then searching and displaying the selected value in selection box area will be based on DisplayMemberPath. If both TextMemberPath and DisplayMemberPath properties are null or string.Empty, then searching and displaying the selected value will be based on value received from object.ToString.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.DropDownControls.DropDownListBase.TextMemberPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the property path that is used to display the selected value in the text box portion or non-editable display area.
member.value: The default value is string.Empty.
member.remarks: In editable mode, search will be performed using TextMemberPath. In non-editable mode, search will be performed using TextMemberPath when the popup is not opened. In non-editable mode, search will be performed using DisplayMemberPath when the popup is opened. If TextMemberPath is null or string.Empty, then searching and displaying the selected value in selection box area will be based on DisplayMemberPath. If both TextMemberPath and DisplayMemberPath properties are null or string.Empty, then searching and displaying the selected value will be based on value received from object.ToString.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.DropDownControls.DropDownListBase.TokenItemStyle
member.summary: Gets or sets the Style that is used to display the token items.
member.value: The default value is null.
member.remarks: It applicable for multi-selection token mode only.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.DropDownControls.DropDownListBase.SelectedValuePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the property path that is used to get the SelectedValue property of the SelectedItem property.
member.value: The default value is string.Empty.
member.remarks: If SelectedValuePath is null, SelectedValue will be received from object.ToString.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.DropDownControls.DropDownListBase.SelectedValue
member.summary: Gets the value of the SelectedItem obtained using SelectedValuePath.
member.remarks: The value of the selected item.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.DropDownControls.DropDownListBase.SelectedItem
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected item.
member.value: The default value is null.

member.summary: Gets or sets the font family that is used to display in the drop down text.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfNumericEntry.Placeholder
member.summary: Gets or sets the text that is displayed in the control until the value is changed by a user action or some other operation.
member.value: The default value is null.
member.remarks: Placeholder text will only appear when is set to NaN or when the input is cleared by the user. Value can be cleared by selecting all the text and delete, by clicking the clear button, or by setting Value to null. Value can be cleared, only when AllowNull is set to true.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfNumericEntry.AllowNull
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the allows null value or not.
member.value: true when allows null value input, otherwise false. The default value is true.
member.remarks: Placeholder text will only appear when is set to NaN or null or when the input is cleared by the user.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.AutocompleteFilterBehavior
member.summary: Represents a filtering behavior for . Using the text entered in control, suggestion list gets created based on . We can override this and show custom suggestions which gets loaded either asynchronously or synchronously.
member.remarks: By default, the suggestions gets loaded asynchronously.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.AutocompleteFilterBehavior.cancellationTokenSource
member.summary: Gets the cancellation token source.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.AutocompleteFilterBehavior.GetMatchingItemsAsync(Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfAutocomplete,Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.AutocompleteFilterInfo)
member.summary: Gets the matching items based on typed text. These matching items can either be loaded asynchronously or synchronously.
member.param: Contains details regarding search text of Autocomplete control.
member.returns: The custom items source based on typed text.
member.remarks: To load asynchronously, return await Task.Run(...); To load synchronously, return await Task.FromResult(...);

member.summary: Dispose the CancellationTokenSource from the memory.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ComboBoxMultiSelectionDisplayMode
member.summary: Defines constants to display multiple selected item in the selection area either as text by separating with delimiter or as token item with clear option in each item.
member.remarks: Token display can be used in editable and non-editable mode where else delimiter is only used in non-editable mode.

member.summary: Represent selected items with text separated using delimiter.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.ComboBoxMultiSelectionDisplayMode.Token
member.summary: Represent selected items using Token.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties
member.summary: Specifies the properties for each character in the mask.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isDigit
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is digit or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsDigit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the mask is digit or not. It takes value from 0 to 9.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isDigitWithSign
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is digit with sign or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsDigitWithSign
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the mask is digit with sign or not. It takes value from 0 to 9 and sign represents the '+' or '-'.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isEscapeChar
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is escape sequence or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsEscapeChar
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the mask contains escape sequence. The '\' is represented as escape sequence.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.maskData
member.summary: The field indicates the mask data.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.MaskData
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicates the mask data of the current mask property for regex masks.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.startIndex
member.summary: The field indicates the start index of the mask data.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.StartIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicates the start index of the mask. It represents the starting index value of the masked text.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.endIndex
member.summary: The field indicates the end index of the mask data.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.EndIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicates the end index of the mask. It represents the end index value of the masked text.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isAlphaNumeric
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is alpha numeric or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsAlphaNumeric
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the mask is alpha numeric or not. Alpha numeric contains both digits and characters.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isLiteral
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is literal or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsLiteral
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whether the mask contains literals. Other than the mask elements all characters in the mask are considered as literals.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isPromptChar
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is prompt character or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsPromptChar
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whether the mask property is prompt char. The default value is '_'.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isUpperCase
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is uppercase or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsUpperCase
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whether the mask property is upper case or not.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isOptional
member.summary: The field indicates whether it is optional or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsOptional
member.summary: Gets or sets the value indicating whether the mask property is optional or not. It accepts zero or one matching input.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.regularExpression
member.summary: The field indicates the regular expressions for the mask.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.RegularExpression
member.summary: Gets or sets the regular expressions in the mask.
member.example: For example [A-Z0-9], these are stored as regular expressions.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.completeExpression
member.summary: The field indicates the complete expressions in the positive look ahead masks.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.CompleteExpression
member.summary: Gets or sets the expressions in the positive look ahead expressions.
member.example: In positive look ahead, the mask is (?=123)\d{3} then (?=123) is stored in the complete expression for restricting when value entered.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.splitExpressions
member.summary: The field indicates the split expressions for the mask using OR opertator.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.SplitExpressions
member.summary: Gets or sets the collections given in the regex mask using OR operator to split the expression.
member.example: In the mask value (0[0-9]|1[1-9]|2[1-3]){2}, The expressions split using OR operator was stored in the split expressions.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.minimumrepetition
member.summary: The field indicates the minimum repetition value in the mask.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.MinimumRepetition
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of minimum repetition value given in the mask.
member.example: For example the mask value \d{3,7}, 3 is the minimum repetition value. We can enter minimum three values from the mask.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.maximumrepetition
member.summary: The field indicates the maximum repetition value in the mask.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.currentRepetition
member.summary: The field indicates the current repetition value in the mask.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.CurrentRepetition
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of current repetition value of the mask. It updates the current repetition value for the repetitive expressions in the mask.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.inputCount
member.summary: The field indicates the input count of mask.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.InputCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the value represent the input count of mask contains the OR operator.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.maxLength
member.summary: The field indicates the maximum length of the expression.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.MaxLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the value set to the maximum length of the expression in the mask contains OR operator.
member.example: For example (0[0-9]|1[1-9]|2[1-3]){2}, the maximum length here was set to 2.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isNegativeLookAhead
member.summary: The field indicates whether the mask contains negative look ahead or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsNegativeLookAhead
member.summary: Gets or sets the value of the indicating whether mask contains negative look ahead or not. The negative look ahead declared like (?!55).

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.negativeLookAheadExpressionList
member.summary: The list stores the negative look ahead expressions given in the mask.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.NegativeLookAheadExpressionList
member.summary: Gets or sets the negative look ahead expressions present in the mask.
member.example: For example (?!55)(?!000)(?!666)\d{3}, the expreesions 55, 000 and 666 are stored in the negative look ahead collections.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.isPositiveLookAhead
member.summary: The field indicates whether the mask contains positive look ahead or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.IsPositiveLookAhead
member.summary: The field indicates whether the mask contains positive look ahead or not. The positive look ahead declared like (?=123).

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.MaskProperties.Dispose
member.summary: Disposes the instance of MaskProperties.

member.summary: Specifies the list of special characters collection.

member.summary: Disposes the instance of SpecialCharactersCollection.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfMaskedEntry
member.summary: The SfMaskedEntry control is an enhanced version of a text box that additionally restricts input to conform to a specific structure or mask.

example.para: This example illustrates how to set email mask value using regex mask.
example.code: <syncfusion:SfMaskedEntry MaskType="RegEx" Mask="[A-Za-z0-9-.%]+@[A-Za-z0-9]+.[A-Za-z]{3}"/>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Inputs.SfMaskedEntry.IsReadOnly
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the is read-only, allowing focus and text selection/copy while preventing any user edits and preserving mask formatting.
member.value: true if the control is read-only and the user cannot change its value; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: When IsReadOnly is set to true, the control remains enabled and can receive focus, but the user is prevented from editing the text. This is useful for scenarios where the content should be visible and selectable but not editable, such as displaying formatted data or masked input that should not be changed.
